title: modulo~
cyclone/%~
description: the modulo of the operation (remainder of the division)

messages.description: a value by which to divide the incoming signal
the modulo of the operation (remainder of the division)

arguments.description: a value by which to divide the incoming signal

body: [modulo~] or [%~] is a signal remainder operator. The left signal is divided by the right inlet input (or argument), and the remainder is output.
